director: Walter Hill, Francis Ford Coppola, Jack Sholder
writer: William Malone, Daniel Chuba, David C. Wilson
actors: James Spader, Peter Facinelli, Robin Tunney
plot: Supernova chronicles the search and rescue patrol of a medical ship in deep space in the early 22nd century and its six-member crew which includes a captain and pilot, a co-pilot, a medical officer, a medical technician, a search and rescue.
